sentences.target: Ich finde das Kabel hinter dem Sofa nicht.
sentences.reading: /ɪç ˈfɪndə das ˈkaːbəl ˈhɪntɐ deːm ˈzoːfaː nɪçt/

translations.de: Ich finde das Kabel hinter dem Sofa nicht.
translations.ipa: /ɪç ˈfɪndə das ˈkaːbəl ˈhɪntɐ deːm ˈzoːfaː nɪçt/
translations.en: I can't find the cable behind the sofa.
translations.es: No encuentro el cable detrás del sofá.
translations.fr: Je ne trouve pas le câble derrière le canapé.
translations.it: Non trovo il cavo dietro il divano.
translations.zh-Hans: 我找不到沙发后面的线。
translations.yue: 我喺梳化後面搵唔到條線。
translations.ru: Я не могу найти кабель за диваном.
translations.pt: Não encontro o cabo atrás do sofá.
translations.he: אני לא מוצא את הכבל מאחורי הספה.
translations.vi: Tôi không tìm thấy dây cáp phía sau ghế sofa.
translations.nl: Ik kan de kabel achter de bank niet vinden.
translations.uk: Я не можу знайти кабель за диваном.
translations.hu: Nem találom a kábelt a kanapé mögött.
translations.hi: मुझे सोफ़े के पीछे वाली केबल नहीं मिल रही है।
translations.pl: Nie mogę znaleźć kabla za kanapą.
translations.el: Δεν βρίσκω το καλώδιο πίσω από τον καναπέ.
translations.nb: Jeg finner ikke kabelen bak sofaen.
translations.id: Aku tidak bisa menemukan kabel di belakang sofa.
translations.sv: Jag hittar inte kabeln bakom soffan.
translations.ro: Nu găsesc cablul în spatele canapelei.
translations.da: Jeg kan ikke finde kablet bag sofaen.
translations.ja: ソファの後ろのケーブルが見つからない。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person singular nominative; subject of the clause.
Finite main verb, present indicative 1st person singular.
Definite article, accusative neuter singular, determiner of 'Kabel'.
Common noun, accusative object of 'finde'.
Preposition meaning 'behind', governing dative case.
Definite article, dative neuter singular with 'hinter'.
Common noun, object of the preposition 'hinter' (dative).
Negation particle, negates the predicate.

sentences.target: Du hältst das Kabel gerade falsch.

translations.de: Du hältst das Kabel gerade falsch.
translations.en: You're holding the cable wrong right now.
translations.es: Ahora mismo estás sujetando el cable mal.
translations.fr: Tu tiens mal le câble en ce moment.
translations.it: Stai tenendo il cavo nel modo sbagliato.
translations.zh-Hans: 你现在拿线的方式不对。
translations.yue: 你而家揸住條線嘅方式唔啱。
translations.pt: Você está segurando o cabo do jeito errado agora.
translations.he: אתה מחזיק את הכבל עכשיו בצורה לא נכונה.
translations.vi: Bây giờ bạn đang cầm dây cáp sai.
translations.ar: أنت تمسك السلك بطريقة خاطئة الآن.
translations.nl: Je houdt de kabel nu verkeerd vast.
translations.hi: तुम अभी केबल गलत तरीके से पकड़े हुए हो।
translations.id: Sekarang kamu memegang kabelnya dengan cara yang salah.
translations.sv: Du håller kabeln fel just nu.
translations.da: Du holder kablet forkert lige nu.
translations.ja: 今、ケーブルの持ち方が間違ってる。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 2nd person singular nominative; subject.
Finite main verb, present indicative 2nd person singular.
Definite article, accusative neuter singular, determiner of 'Kabel'.
Common noun, direct object of 'hältst'.
Adverb of time/phase, modifies the verb ('at the moment').
Adverb of manner, indicates the action is performed incorrectly.

sentences.target: Das neue Kabel passt nicht in den Anschluss.
sentences.reading: /das ˈnɔʏə ˈkaːbəl past nɪçt ɪn deːn ˈanʃlʊs/

translations.de: Das neue Kabel passt nicht in den Anschluss.
translations.ipa: /das ˈnɔʏə ˈkaːbəl past nɪçt ɪn deːn ˈanʃlʊs/
translations.en: The new cable doesn't fit into the port.
translations.es: El cable nuevo no encaja en el puerto.
translations.fr: Le nouveau câble ne rentre pas dans le port.
translations.it: Il cavo nuovo non entra nella porta.
translations.ru: Новый кабель не подходит к порту.
translations.pt: O cabo novo não encaixa na porta.
translations.vi: Cáp mới không khớp với cổng.
translations.nl: De nieuwe kabel past niet in de aansluiting.
translations.uk: Новий кабель не підходить до роз'єму.
translations.hu: Az új kábel nem illik a csatlakozóba.
translations.hi: नई केबल पोर्ट में फिट नहीं हो रही है।
translations.pl: Nowy kabel nie pasuje do portu.
translations.el: Το νέο καλώδιο δεν ταιριάζει στη θύρα.
translations.nb: Den nye kabelen passer ikke i porten.
translations.id: Kabel baru tidak pas ke port.
translations.sv: Den nya kabeln passar inte i porten.
translations.ro: Cablul nou nu încape în port.
translations.da: Det nye kabel passer ikke i porten.
translations.ja: 新しいケーブルがポートに合わない。

tokens.explanation: Definite article, nominative neuter singular; determiner of the subject 'Kabel'.
Attributive adjective modifying 'Kabel' (weak inflection).
Common noun, grammatical subject.
Finite main verb, present indicative 3rd person singular.
Negation particle, negates the predicate.
Preposition 'in', here governing accusative (target of fitting).
Definite article, accusative masculine singular with 'in'.
Common noun, object of the preposition 'in'.

sentences.target: Wir teilen uns das Kabel am Ladegerät.
sentences.reading: /viːɐ̯ ˈtaɪ̯lən ʊns das ˈkaːbəl am ˈlaːdəɡəˌʁɛːt/

translations.de: Wir teilen uns das Kabel am Ladegerät.
translations.ipa: /viːɐ̯ ˈtaɪ̯lən ʊns das ˈkaːbəl am ˈlaːdəɡəˌʁɛːt/
translations.en: We're sharing the cable at the charger.
translations.fr: On partage le câble du chargeur.
translations.ko: 우리는 충전기 케이블을 같이 쓰고 있어.
translations.pt: Estamos compartilhando o cabo do carregador.
translations.he: אנחנו חולקים את הכבל של המטען.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi đang dùng chung dây sạc.
translations.nl: We delen de kabel van de oplader.
translations.hi: हम चार्जर की केबल साझा कर रहे हैं।
translations.pl: Wspólnie korzystamy z kabla od ładowarki.
translations.sv: Vi delar på kabeln till laddaren.
translations.cs: Dělíme se o kabel od nabíječky.
translations.ja: 充電器のケーブルを一緒に使っている。
